75390.subject: How Taylor Swift’s Wedding Could Easily Top $20 Million
75390.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/how-taylor-swifts-wedding-could-easily-top-20-million-fycmc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKSZdhhUsTEar9ossh00yLg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1_ShO8R4m5sIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr40d65w~qv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr40d65w-qv
  
Good evening, Billionaire pop Taylor Swift and Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce have reportedly booked Madison Square Garden—which can hold around 20,000 people—for a 100-person event on July 2, as well as a second celebration for between 500 and 999 guests on July 3. An increasing pile of evidence suggests it’ll be her wedding weekend, and money will be no object. Here’s why it will cost so much. We’ll be back Tuesday after the July 4th break. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Illustration: Macy Sinreich for Forbes; Photos: Andrew Howe, Andrii Yalanskyi/500px via Getty Images Millennials Are Buying Blue Collar Small Businesses To AI-Proof Their Future Young entrepreneurs are snapping up baby boomer-owned companies in the hopes of turning a profit. Getty Images AI Is Changing Work. These Are The Human Skills Employers Want Most Experts say employers are looking for candidates with essential skills that can complement and utilize AI, but can’t be replaced by it.
Приєднатися до обговорення

75388.subject: America at 250—anxious and awesomely powerful
75388.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3x8xoAmYJDvpCwgQlHw2pxUWGyi-BJmJ6PYpp9dW-KeulXw9O7w_a28HsEVaffKncZ_HW_VOLXRbkkuWC3TpKvHxpsSymKmXjAJatXOhh0ntw 

July 2nd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist This Week

 Highlights from the latest issue


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3x8xoAnmDYAwEkLs2PaiNREjqSdQwTXppmf6l2u0gIjV8P25JPc26Wdxw4BVp_Btc8_3WMgjSswIXrwJaUrpSZJatciaQxqnCR37_sd2pQMsw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3x8xoAoVvS5J0ub0gL_VpX6lBMTFSPEJhwH7dggC8BdYN7SXcRDS9HnXEHTVIHSjSjQD0pXiEocWnRwHwani9k-7wBuYet4D9a4PMOu1mzYpw 







 


https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjV9AAcAAAAAA3x8xoApw6aOCV7sBmk-5j80YIEPgpOpotQ5SKnNHrJzqi1tvhmaKIMhpc3QBRuntj4OTOKK6vs2UanhoToGXUU2XXzhRDND6sk7m8Or 



Robert Guest

Deputy editor



 When my wife and I lived in America, every time our wedding anniversary came round, crowds would gather in the streets of our neighbourhood, flags would appear on every front porch and fireworks would illuminate the sky. They weren’t celebrating us, of course. It just so happened that the day we got hitched was July 4th, the same day on which America (some years previously) got divorced.


 We were struck, as Brits, by the joy of these occasions. No other country I can think of celebrates its founding quite like America does, perhaps because no other country was

75387.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Bitwise CIO says bitcoin's bottom is close
75387.body:
FBI Director Kash Patel disclosed six-figure Strategy stock purchase months after trade | Kalshi and Polymarket's combined volume surges 75% to $45 billion in June amid World Cup fever | Peter Thiel-backed crypto-friendly Erebor Bank eyes $8 billion valuation as deposits nearly quadruple | Robinhood CEO says future of crypto is in real-world assets, not memecoins |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! *Bitcoin* reclaimed $61,000 as analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407020/accumulation-beneath-the-surface-bitcoin-rebounds-above-61000-as-long-term-holders-accumulate-amid-steady-etf-outflows?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) long-term holders are quietly accumulating, even as U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs continue to bleed capital.

In today's newsletter, *Bitwise* CIO *Matt Hougan* says *bitcoin* may be nearing a bottom, *FBI* Director *Kash Patel* disclosed a six-figure purchase of *Strategy* stock roughly six months late, *Kalshi* and *Polymarket's* combined volume surges amid *World Cup* fever, and more.

Meanwhile, *Metaplanet* added ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406999/metaplanet-bitcoin-acquisition-q2?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) 2,823 *bitcoin* to its holdings in Q2, bringing its total haul to 43,000 BTC.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🧐 'I think we're nearing the bottom': Bitwise CIO says Strategy's STRC selloff is part of bitcoin's end-of-cycle dynamics*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407013/i-think-were-nearing-the-bottom-bitwise-cio-says-strategys-strc-selloff-is-part-of-bitcoins-end-of-cycle-dynamics?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Bitwise* CIO *Matt Hougan* called the sharp selloff in *Strategy's STRC* preferred stock a "painful but necessary" part of the crypto cycle that reflects the kind of deleveraging that typically precedes a market bottom.

* STRC fell as low as $75 from its $100 par value as investors doubted Strategy could keep paying the dividend, which it can suspend at its own discretion.
* Hougan argued the concern is overstated, noting Strategy holds enough *bitcoin* and cash to cover 28 years of dividends even at today's prices.
* Strategy overha

75382.subject: Important updates to your MetaMask CL Card agreements
75382.body:
Important Update Regarding Your Card 
Dear Oleh

We’re reaching out to let you know about a small, behind-the-scenes update to 
the providers that support your MetaMask CL Card. First, the good news: there’s 
nothing you need to do. Your card and the way you use your account all stay 
exactly the same. We just believe you should always know who’s looking after 
your account. Here’s what’s changing, and why:

From 1 July 2026, the crypto-asset services in your account will be powered by 
MoonPay Europe B.V., a crypto-asset service provider authorized under the EU 
Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) by the Netherlands Authority for the 
Financial Markets (AFM). Your card and payments providers continue unchanged.

This change does not alter the terms of your agreement with us. The updated 
terms that apply to the crypto-asset services are MoonPay’sTerms of Use 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/terms_of_use_europe> and Privacy Policy 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/privacy_policy>.

We’re proud to keep powering your MetaMask CL Card.

Questions about this update, or anything else on your account? We’re always 
happy to help at metamask@cl-cards.com <mailto:support@cl-cards.com>.

Need a new card? You can order one in the app in a couple of taps, and don’t 
forget you can delegate and spend straight from your wallet.

Crypto-asset services are provided by MoonPay Europe B.V., authorized by the 
Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets
(AFM) under Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA). Card and payment services are 
provided by Monavate Ltd, The Officers Mess Business Centre, Royston Road, 
Duxford,Cambridge, England, CB22 4QH
Unsubscribe 
<https://links.cl-cards.com/s/u/SiQ5AD4WG0u6jZlbDv-szh-il9QkEQ71njmDn-dBiCUfN6hxuhb3aQxuoEfI_4dCx_SaHmZg7ZrymRTUDsQfQzJYmGJsICucyuDvBin9LDGcybkapoMmbeTeXCMf11u3MeAA1EK7aQ6BoHaZQv3BRz5n8kQlSQt9aZ6ndM0DQE9t0VKBIW7P_5ZpMv6n/uQhGfkvsprPzLWOPljn1rZz5zHOjmEC5/22>

75380.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 2
75380.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-2-cryptobeholder-lskpf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B782s%2FVXeTbuwFJswpOIhXA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1xCUKtuXuossk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr3s3byc~9b-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr3s3byc-9b
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Relief rally meets regulation: Bitcoin reclaims $61K on dovish Fed signals and weak jobs data, while Washington flexes sanctions muscle and global banks push deeper into stablecoins and tokenized stocks. 📈 Bitcoin Surges Past $61,000 as Inflation Fears Ease Bitcoin jumped more than 4% to trade above $61,000 — its strongest level in over a week — after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signaled that inflation risks had softened and June payrolls came in at just 57,000 new jobs, well below forecasts. The dovish shift trimmed rate-hike bets and triggered over $437M in short liquidations, with smaller tokens leading what traders called the first real bounce of the selloff. Read full story 🚫 US Sanctions 134 ISIS-K Crypto Wallets, Tether Freezes Funds OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses tied to ISIS-K to its sanctions list — including 131 Tron addresses that collected over $1.4 million in donations — while Tether froze the associated funds in near real time. The action shows stablecoin issuers and on-chain analytics have effectively become part of the sanctions enforcement machine. More details 🏦 Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank With Direct USDC Access Standard Chartered is now the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutional clients mint and redeem Circle's USDC directly on banking rails, starting in Dubai's DIFC with global expansion planned. It's a landmark step in fusing regulated banking infrastructure with stablecoin liquidity. Read more ⚠️ JPMorgan Flags "Two-Way Risk" in Strategy's Bitcoin Sales Policy JPMorgan warned that Strategy's policy of selling Bitcoin adds avoidable uncertainty to crypto markets, arguing the company should instead issue equity to build cash reserves. Cantor Fitzgerald, by contrast, sees the firm's new Digital Credit Capital Framework driving the stock up 115% — a stark split in how Wall Street reads the biggest corporate BTC holder. See details 🔄 Nasdaq-Listed K Wave Media Dumps Entire Bitcoin Treasury for AI Korean media firm K Wave Media, which once lined up $1 billion to buy 10,000 BTC in a copy of Michael Saylor's playbook, confirmed in a filing that its Bitcoin balance is now zero. Debt repayment, collateral pressure, and a fight to keep its Nasdaq listing pushed the company into a full pivot to AI infrastructure — a cautiona
